description_long: This is a modern, single-story house with a flat roof and a minimalist geometric layout. The structure features large floor-to-ceiling windows along one side, providing ample natural light and a seamless connection to the outdoors. The property includes a driveway leading to a garage, a swimming pool, and landscaped areas with trees and shrubs. There is a pergola-covered patio area, likely intended for outdoor seating or dining, and solar panels are visible on the roof. The exterior is predominantly white with some gray accents, emphasizing a clean and contemporary aesthetic. The house is surrounded by a mix of paved and green spaces, creating a balanced urban residential environment.
description: A modern, single-story house with a flat roof, large windows, a garage, pool, and landscaped outdoor areas. The design is minimalist with white and gray tones and includes solar panels and a pergola patio.
description_view_0: This view highlights the garage, driveway, and a portion of the pool area, with trees and landscaping visible at the rear.
description_view_1: The front facade is visible, showing the main entrance, garage, and a row of trees lining the property, with the pergola and pool in the background.
description_view_2: The side view emphasizes the large windows, pergola-covered patio, and landscaped garden, with the pool and solar panels also visible.
description_view_3: This angle showcases the row of trees along the property edge, the pool, and the solar panels on the roof, with the house's rear and side features in view.
attribute_entryway_design: Simple main entry with a flat overhang, adjacent to the garage, no visible steps or porch, minimalist design
